description_long: This is a modern grave structure composed primarily of dark and light gray stone, set on a rectangular base. The grave features a raised platform with a flat slab covering the burial site, and a vertical headstone at one end. The headstone is inscribed with gold-colored text and a prominent gold cross, giving it a solemn and respectful appearance. The base is slightly elevated and bordered by a darker stone frame, providing a sense of permanence and stability. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on geometric forms, typical of contemporary cemetery monuments.
description: A modern grave with a dark stone base, flat slab, and an upright headstone featuring gold inscriptions and a cross.
description_view_0: Front view showing the layered stone structure and the headstone's geometric silhouette.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the slab and the vertical headstone at the far end.
description_view_2: Reverse front view displaying the gold cross and inscriptions on the headstone, with the full length of the grave visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slab's profile and the headstone's rear, with the base's border visible.
